message:
feat: add `pi doctor` to the early-exit fast path bypassing async runtime

Move the Doctor command (with path, format, and policy args) to the same
pre-runtime early-exit branch as `pi list` and `pi config`. This is a
local-only diagnostic query that reads config and checks environment
health — it does not need the async runtime, extension manager, or
provider connections, so initializing them adds unnecessary startup
latency.

The handle_doctor() call now returns early from main_impl() before the
async runtime is constructed, matching the pattern established for other
offline subcommands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
